overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing two characters walking along a commercial city street in Los Santos. The clip begins near the Wigwam burger restaurant and progresses along the sidewalk past various storefronts before crossing an intersection into a residential area with palm trees and apartment buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with fast food restaurant and retail

events.description: camera briefly slows while passing pedestrians standing on sidewalk corner

agents.ego_description: following two male characters walking along the commercial sidewalk, one wearing a brown shirt and the other a black shirt with burger logo

notable_agents.action: two male pedestrians walking ahead of camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: fast food building with large yellow signage and blue trim
tall vertical billboard featuring a bottle advertisement
multi-story modern glass and concrete office towers
patio umbrellas and tables outside the restaurant

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny urban commercial street, following two characters walking along a concrete sidewalk past the Wigwam burger restaurant. The area features mixed architecture with modern office towers visible in the distance and small retail storefronts at street level. Sparse pedestrian activity and light vehicle traffic characterize the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: retail street with shoe stores and american flag decorations

events.description: camera pans left to observe street traffic and glass office towers across the road
camera returns to forward-facing position following the walking characters

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the two characters while briefly observing the street traffic to the left

entered.detail: retail storefront with blue awning and multiple american flags mounted on facade
row of united states flags hanging from building facade
standard traffic signal poles at intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the sidewalk past various retail storefronts, including a shoe store decorated with American flags. Around the 24-second mark, the camera pans left to observe the street traffic and modern glass office towers before returning to follow the characters. The commercial architecture transitions from restaurants to retail shops with security gates.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection crossing into residential neighborhood

events.description: approaching intersection crosswalk, transitioning from commercial to residential zone
crossing the street at the crosswalk while traffic waits at red light

agents.ego_description: following the characters across the street intersection and continuing into the residential sidewalk

notable_agents.action: motorcyclist waiting at the red traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: three-story yellow stucco apartment building with balconies
white painted pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
two-story pink residential building visible down the street
single-family homes and small apartment buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a street intersection, crossing the road at the crosswalk, and entering a residential neighborhood. The yellow apartment building becomes the dominant landmark as the commercial storefronts recede. A motorcyclist waits at the traffic light as the characters cross, and the environment shifts from dense commercial retail to residential housing with palm trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny urban corridor that transforms from a commercial retail strip into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins on a concrete sidewalk following two characters past the Wigwam burger restaurant, with modern office towers looming in the distance. As the camera progresses, the scenery shifts from eateries to various retail storefronts, including a shoe store adorned with American flags, while a brief pan left captures the flow of street traffic and glass skyscrapers. The scene then opens up toward a street intersection where the characters cross the road past a waiting motorcyclist, causing the dense commercial architecture to recede. Finally, the environment transitions into a residential area characterized by palm trees and a prominent yellow apartment building.
